info.title: StockIN
info.description: Sistema de gerenciamento de estoque com PDV, desenvolvido como projeto pessoal, incluindo controle de compras, vendas, reposição e auditoria completa de movimentações, devoluções e alterações de produtos. Implementa autenticação JWT stateless e segue princípios de Clean Code, com foco em organização, manutenibilidade e robustez.

tags.name: Transactions
tags.description: GET endpoints for auditing and transaction history

put.description: Update your user or update other users if you are an admin.

delete.description: Delete a user by ID if you are an admin

post.description: Register a new user if the email address has not already been used.
Register a new sale if there are enough products in stock
Logs the user in and returns the token

get.summary: Find a simple transaction by ID
Find a sale transaction by ID
Find a purchase transaction by ID
Find a devolution transaction by ID
Find a product adjustment transaction by ID
Find a product sotck by ID
